metadata.title: Palacio del Mar – Luxury Beachfront Condos for Sale in Rosarito, Baja CA
metadata.description: Palacio del Mar is an upscale beachfront condominium community in the Rosarito corridor. Live in luxury on the Pacific coast with premium finishes, spectacular ocean views, and world-class amenities.

hero.subheadline: The premiere oceanfront community in Baja — finished, move-in-ready luxury condos and oceanfront villas in Rosarito, just south of the San Diego border.

amenities.heading: Resort-style amenities designed for everyday living
amenities.body1: Amenities Define Luxury Real Estate. It is the Amenities at Palacio del Mar that define what luxury real estate is in Baja compared to real estate developments in general.
amenities.body2: Palacio del Mar is the only community on the coast that has a large indoor heated pool.

finishedResidences.body: An established oceanfront community in Rosarito's Bahía Descanso. Tower II represents the final inventory of luxury condos currently available — fully built and move-in ready.
